# AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/sync_native.py — standalone libemq for bindings.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(emq_native VERSION 1.0.0 LANGUAGES C)

set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_C_EXTENSIONS OFF)

option(EMQ_BUILD_SHARED "Build shared libemq" ON)

set(EMQ_SOURCES
  src/platform/emq_platform.c
  src/core/emq_alloc.c
  src/core/emq_crc.c
  src/core/emq_record.c
  src/core/emq_log.c
  src/core/emq_pool.c
  src/core/emq_bitmap.c
  src/core/emq_ebr.c
  src/core/emq_lfq.c
  src/core/emq_cpu.c
  src/core/emq_domain.c
  src/core/emq_hist.c
  src/core/emq_stats_ex.c
  src/core/emq_task.c
  src/core/emq_compress.c
  src/core/emq_fault.c
  src/policy/emq_policy.c
  src/registry/emq_registry.c
  src/sched/emq_wheel.c
  src/sched/emq_sched.c
  src/routing/emq_routing.c
  src/primitives/emq_fifo.c
  src/primitives/emq_priority.c
  src/primitives/emq_ring.c
  src/primitives/emq_delay.c
  src/primitives/emq_workqueue.c
  src/primitives/emq_stream.c
  src/primitives/emq_pubsub.c
  src/primitives/emq_dispatch.c
  src/engine/emq_mpmc.c
  src/engine/emq_engine.c
  src/engine/emq_eventloop.c
  src/api/emq.c
)

add_library(emq_static STATIC ${EMQ_SOURCES})
set_target_properties(emq_static PROPERTIES OUTPUT_NAME emq)
target_include_directories(emq_static PUBLIC
  $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
  PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
target_compile_definitions(emq_static PRIVATE
  $<$<BOOL:${WIN32}>:EMQ_PLATFORM_WINDOWS _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS>
  $<$<AND:$<NOT:$<BOOL:${WIN32}>>,$<BOOL:${APPLE}>>:_DARWIN_C_SOURCE EMQ_PLATFORM_POSIX>
  $<$<AND:$<NOT:$<BOOL:${WIN32}>>,$<NOT:$<BOOL:${APPLE}>>>:_GNU_SOURCE EMQ_PLATFORM_POSIX>)

if(WIN32)
  target_link_libraries(emq_static PUBLIC Synchronization)
else()
  find_package(Threads REQUIRED)
  target_link_libraries(emq_static PUBLIC Threads::Threads)
endif()

if(EMQ_BUILD_SHARED)
  add_library(emq SHARED ${EMQ_SOURCES})
  set_target_properties(emq PROPERTIES
    OUTPUT_NAME emq
    VERSION 1.0.0
    SOVERSION 0
    C_VISIBILITY_PRESET hidden
    WINDOWS_EXPORT_ALL_SYMBOLS ON)
  target_include_directories(emq PUBLIC
    $<BUILD_INTERFACE:${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/include>
    PRIVATE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src)
  target_compile_definitions(emq PUBLIC EMQ_BUILD_SHARED=1 PRIVATE EMQ_EXPORTS=1
    $<$<BOOL:${WIN32}>:EMQ_PLATFORM_WINDOWS _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS>
    $<$<AND:$<NOT:$<BOOL:${WIN32}>>,$<BOOL:${APPLE}>>:_DARWIN_C_SOURCE EMQ_PLATFORM_POSIX>
    $<$<AND:$<NOT:$<BOOL:${WIN32}>>,$<NOT:$<BOOL:${APPLE}>>>:_GNU_SOURCE EMQ_PLATFORM_POSIX>)
  if(WIN32)
    target_link_libraries(emq PUBLIC Synchronization)
  else()
    target_link_libraries(emq PUBLIC Threads::Threads)
  endif()
endif()

install(TARGETS emq_static
  ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
  LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
  RUNTIME DESTINATION bin)
if(EMQ_BUILD_SHARED)
  install(TARGETS emq
    ARCHIVE DESTINATION lib
    LIBRARY DESTINATION lib
    RUNTIME DESTINATION bin)
endif()
install(DIRECTORY include/ DESTINATION include)
